title: Parkio Daily: May 3, 2026
teaser: Disney Week of Wishes continues worldwide. Plus live streams from Disneyland and Magic Kingdom, new food spotlights, and Star Wars Nite merch.

bignews.title: Disney Week of Wishes celebrates Make-A-Wish partnerships worldwide
bignews.body: Disney parks around the globe are hosting wish experiences for children facing critical illnesses. Disneyland Paris welcomed 80 wish families from 10 countries for a Frozen-inspired celebration. Hong Kong Disneyland granted a photography-themed wish and announced an HK$800,000 donation to Make-A-Wish Hong Kong. Tokyo Disney Resort, Shanghai Disney Resort, and other parks are granting wishes all week. Since 1980, Disney has worked with Make-A-Wish to grant more than 175,000 wishes worldwide.

spotlight.title: A wish is granted every hour
spotlight.body: Throughout Disney Week of Wishes, Disney parks are working with Make-A-Wish chapters to create life-changing moments for children and their families. From professional photography sessions to Super Hero training and character encounters, each wish is tailored to the passions and dreams of the wish child. The partnership has created magical memories for families around the world for more than four decades.
